ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the album the song belongs to */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song on the album */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song (0-11) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song (dB) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (0-1) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (BPM) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song (ms) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song (0-100) */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of music the artist creates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON string containing user preferences (e.g., favorite genres, artists) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is collaborative */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public, private, unlisted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all songs in the playlist (ms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist creates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "genre")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "feature")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover art */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playback_history" (
  "playback_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playback event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration the song was played (ms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playback_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playback_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
